meta.title: Michel Ribeiro Viana — Senior QA Engineer | AI-First Testing
meta.description: Senior QA Engineer with 13+ years of experience and an AI-First mindset. Specializing in Robot Framework, Cypress, and Prompt Engineering for Quality Assurance.

about.title: Driving Quality Through AI Innovation
about.description: Senior QA with over 13 years of experience and an AI-First Mindset, strategically leading Greenfield Projects and Critical System Turnarounds. I specialize in leveraging LLMs to architect testing solutions before code is written, using GitHub Copilot to maximize speed and coverage across Robot Framework and Cypress.

highlights.label: AI-First Mindset
highlights.description: Leveraging LLMs and GitHub Copilot to architect test solutions before implementation

highlights.label: Greenfield Expert
highlights.description: Building quality frameworks from zero for new and complex projects

highlights.label: Turnaround Specialist
highlights.description: Unblocking stalled critical systems and driving them to production

highlights.label: Technical Point of Contact
highlights.description: Bridging development teams and stakeholders at major enterprises

builtWith.title: Built With AI
builtWith.description: This portfolio is a live proof-of-concept. Every section was designed, written, and coded through a structured multi-agent orchestration — documenting how Prompt Engineering skills translate into real engineering output.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Real challenges. Structured thinking. Measurable outcomes. Cases are being decoded and will be published soon.
projects.placeholder: Case study being decoded — coming soon.

items.title: Legacy Energy Platform Turnaround
items.challenge: 5-year stalled mission-critical energy billing system. Oracle DB, 200+ business rules, no test coverage.
items.approach: Defined E2E test architecture from scratch. Led homologation sessions with C-level stakeholders.
items.result: Production-ready in 6 months. 100% business rule coverage. Zero critical regressions post-go-live.

items.title: AI-Accelerated BDD — Agro Report
items.challenge: Greenfield agricultural data platform with no existing test infrastructure and tight delivery timeline.
items.approach: Bootstrapped full BDD framework. Used GitHub Copilot to accelerate scenario authoring 3×.
items.result: 100% BDD coverage at launch. API contracts validated via Bruno/Postman. 0 regression escapes.

items.title: NFSE Fiscal Automation — TOTVS ERP
items.challenge: Brazil's #1 ERP needed automated fiscal invoice validation across complex multi-rule scenarios.
items.approach: Built API automation suite + MongoDB data validation layer covering full NFS-e lifecycle.
items.result: Zero compliance escapes. Full invoice lifecycle fully covered. Fiscal integrity guaranteed at scale.

highlights: Technical leadership in the turnaround of the Fault Monitoring and Diagnostics System (UC 8.2), enabling the evolution of legacy architecture to an integrated high-availability model in 6 months.
Homologation of complex business rules for battery autonomy calculation (SOC/SOH) and infrastructure alarming (Site Down, AC Failure), ensuring 100% regulatory compliance.
Validation of multi-source data ingestion flows (SG-Infra, Prisma, NetEco/Panda, and TEMS) operated via Airflow, Apache NiFi, and distributed processing with Spark.
Execution of End-to-End and integrity tests in multi-layer data architecture, covering processing in Hive (365-day retention), PostgreSQL (Raw/Gold), and Druid database.
Guaranteed stability in the alarm rules engine and Kafka topic publishing for integration with event management systems and SIGITM ticket opening.
Implementation of full traceability via Azure DevOps for over 200 critical scenarios, covering configurable dashboards, visualization APIs, and geographical hierarchy.
Technical leadership in the turnaround of a legacy energy management platform stalled for 5 years, restructuring the QA strategy and enabling production deployment in just 6 months.
Direct management of homologation with C-level stakeholders, ensuring 100% compliance with complex energy sector business rules and ANEEL regulatory norms.
Execution of End-to-End (E2E) tests with deep data integrity validation (Frontend  Oracle DB), mitigating risks of financial and operational inconsistencies.
Implementation of full test lifecycle traceability via Azure DevOps for over 200 critical scenarios, elevating the project's quality maturity and governance level.
Guaranteed stability in highly technically complex flows, ranging from the user interface to high-volume backend data processing.
Leadership and construction of the Greenfield test framework for the Agro Report product, ensuring 100% BDD coverage in critical rural credit analysis and socio-environmental risk flows.
Optimization of the QA pipeline using Generative AI (GitHub Copilot), achieving a 3x increase in the speed of writing BDD scenarios for complex ESG and compliance rule validation.
Implementation of automation with Robot Framework and RESTful API contract testing via Bruno/Postman, ensuring integration integrity with data bureaus and geospatial monitoring systems.
Strategic performance in Quality Engineering, actively participating in architecture definitions and test planning for Data-Driven Decisions solutions.
Promotion of the Shift-Left culture through technical collaboration in agile ceremonies, reducing rework and accelerating the delivery cycle of highly critical features.
Homologation of data intelligence reports, validating the accuracy of sanction, embargo, and sustainability policy compliance indicators.
QA focused on the TMS (Transportation Management System) module of the TOTVS ERP, ensuring the integrity of freight management and transport document processes.
Critical automation of fiscal validation for NFS-e issuance, ensuring compliance with complex tax rules and achieving zero escapes in production.
Development of scripts for API testing and data validation in MongoDB, ensuring information persistence and consistency in high-volume fiscal flows.
Full homologation of the electronic document lifecycle, covering 100% of issuance, authorization, and cancellation scenarios within the logistics suite.
Validation of integrations between the fiscal back-office and operational modules, ensuring the stability of the market-leading system in Brazil.
QA technical focal point between 3 development squads, reducing integration blockers by 40% and optimizing feature hand-offs for the Hotels module.
Complete modeling of BDD (Behavior Driven Development) test suites managed via Zephyr Scale, covering over 500 critical reservation and ticketing scenarios.
Leadership of the multi-platform (Web and Android) regression testing cycle, ensuring sales funnel stability from availability search to payment checkout.
Technical validation of integrations with partner APIs and hotel inventories, ensuring price parity and coupon/miles processing integrity.
Execution of exploratory usability and performance testing focused on conversion and user journey under high-volume traffic scenarios.
Homologation of critical post-sales flows, including voucher generation, cancellations, and automatic refunds within the hospitality ecosystem.
Development and maintenance of Python and Selenium automation suites to stabilize mission-critical systems in 3PL logistics operations.
Validation of complex operational flows involving Warehousing (WMS), Transportation (TMS), and value-added services for highly rigorous industries (Healthcare, Food, and Retail).
Data integrity and performance guarantee in Full Truckload (FTL), Less-Than-Truckload (LTL), and International Logistics processes.
Execution of automated tests to ensure 24/7 continuity of supply chain operations integrated with the Traxion platform ecosystem.
Implementation of regression testing routines to mitigate risks in software integrations that support millions of kilometers traveled and square meters of warehousing.
International QA in Point of Sale (POS) ecosystems for Burger King and Popeyes brands, validating critical multi-region requirements (languages, currencies, and fiscal compliance).
Validation of microservices-based platforms, ensuring the integrity of order, payment, and back-office integration flows.
End-to-End testing in Self-Service (Kiosk) and Drive-Thru solutions for Tier 1 QSR operations, focusing on high availability and performance.
Homologation of APIs for integrating POS software with various hardware peripherals and global payment gateways.
Interoperability and scalability guarantee for customized systems, ensuring the stability of large-scale retail operations.
End-to-End QA on the credit recovery and billing platform, validating financial calculation engines and multi-channel trigger rules.
Implementation of Selenium WebDriver automation for validating back-office systems and debt negotiation portals.
Data integrity validation via MS-SQL Server, performing direct manipulations and queries to ensure balance and history consistency in transactional databases.
Multi-platform homologation (Web, Backend, and Mobile), ensuring user journey integrity in debt settlement flows.
API integration testing for digital service channels and data enrichment via credit bureaus.
End-to-End QA in the SBE/ABT ecosystem, validating EMV (Contactless), NFC, and QR Code payments for flows of 2M+ transactions/day.
Construction of the first Selenium WebDriver + Python automation framework from scratch to validate back-office systems and sales portals.
Hardware and software integration testing for ITS and Fleet Management Systems (SGF), operating with telemetry, GPS, and onboard consoles on Embedded Linux.
Technical validation of anti-fraud Facial Biometrics systems and homologation of Automated Teller Machines (ATM) and POS devices.
Execution of stress and load tests in electronic ticketing environments to ensure financial clearing integrity.
QA of mission-critical systems for Access Control and Traffic, ensuring 99.9% uptime in high-availability environments like airports, hospitals, and stadiums.
Technical homologation of hardware and firmware for motorized gates (dFlow, dGate) and turnstiles (Catrax), validating passage sensors and security mechanisms.
Integration testing between access controllers (MCAnet) and smart terminals, ensuring real-time triggering accuracy and communication.
Massive API testing execution (SoapUI) to integrate passenger control and revenue systems (SCAP) with the back-office.
Advanced manipulation of Oracle and SQL Server databases to validate event logs, access rules, and audit data integrity.
